localizations.title: Heat
localizations.hiddenObject_98: A note is on the ground in the garage.
localizations.hint_1: An interview with Legend could provide valuable insights for the upcoming race.
localizations.hint_98: The interview isn't very exciting; instead, focus on the weather forecasts.
localizations.hint_30: This isn't a red card. Pay attention to the green light and you'll know what to do next.
localizations.hint_90: Look at the back of the remaining cards and count how many have a car matching your color.
localizations.hint_12: You need to find something that will allow you to tighten the screws again.
localizations.hint_46: The hood is too hot to open with your bare hands!
localizations.hint_72: It's pretty hard to see with all this sand blowing around. You'll need to find a way to protect your eyes.
localizations.hint_74: Examine the circuit map to see which way you need to turn.
localizations.hint_4_first: On the circuit map, what speed is shown at the end of the long straight?
localizations.hint_4: This card is special. Check the circle on the back.
localizations.hint_89: Your car spun out 180°. You'll need to steer your car back to face the correct direction.
localizations.hint_68: You must get right behind Legend. What is this card's number?
localizations.hint_67: If you follow the instructions, you'll trace two numbers.
localizations.hint_31: You are looking at Legend's car in your rearview mirror. That means the number you are seeing is actually mirrored.
localizations.hint_81: The wheels of both cars are right up against each other. Looking closely, they form a number.
localizations.hint_8_first: Search the discard pile for the two unusual incidents that happened in your previous races.
localizations.hint_8: One of them pertains to your loose steering wheel in Japan; the other relates to your overheated engine in the USA.
localizations.hint_20: Try to gather information about the renowned Number 1 racer!
localizations.hint_66: Find the garages on the circuit map.
localizations.hint_96_first: You've seen Legend's tire tread pattern throughout your adventure.
localizations.hint_96: Carefully examine the back of the cards featuring Legend's red car.
localizations.hint_40: The press will extensively cover the issue related to this non-compliant fuel.
localizations.hint_99: Check out this article. It's a must-read!
localizations.hint_6_first: Fighting would be unwise, but your lucky coin is sure to land as "tails".
localizations.hint_6: On card 13, you see the TAILS side of your coin. Can you guess the value on the HEADS side?
localizations.hint_16: There's just one type of tire remaining. Examine card 16 closely.
localizations.hint_14_first: You need to unscrew the four screws in a specific sequence.
localizations.hint_14: Each screw involves performing an arithmetical operation, starting with the number 14.
localizations.hint_50_first: Pay close attention to the location of each gear as shown on the gearshift lever.
localizations.hint_50: If you follow Liz's instructions, you will trace a number.
localizations.hint_42: The grandstands are near the bottom left, and the curve is even further to the left.
localizations.hint_60_first: You'll need to test each car body for the same duration of time.
localizations.hint_60: The car body that travels the greatest distance in that time is the best one to use.
localizations.hint_21_first: Gently move each pin until it clicks into place.
localizations.hint_21: Repeat the operation for each pin to unlock the gate.
localizations.hint_machine_3_pneus_first: The weather forecast is taped to the wall of the garage.
localizations.hint_machine_3_pneus: Next to your gloves (26), you can see a watch indicating that it's currently almost 14:00; the race begins one hour later.
localizations.hint_machine_3_rpm_first: The gauges display your speed throughout the race. Each dip represents a slowdown as you go around a curve.
localizations.hint_machine_3_rpm: Count the curves in the circuit and compare them with the various gauges.
localizations.hint_machine_91_pneus: The treadmarks on card 91 will help you make the right decision.
localizations.hint_machine_91_rpm_first: The gauges display your speed throughout the race. Each dip represents a slowdown as you go around a curve.
localizations.hint_machine_91_rpm: Count the curves in the circuit and compare them with the various gauges.
localizations.hint_machine_91_pedal_susp: Remember which choices Liz made before the first race.
localizations.hint_machine_41_pneus: There's just one type of tire remaining. Examine card 16 closely.
localizations.hint_machine_41_rpm_first: The RPM gauges display your speed throughout the race. Each dip represents a slowdown as you go around a curve.
localizations.hint_machine_41_rpm: Count the curves in the circuit and compare them with the various gauges.
localizations.hint_machine_41_pedal_susp: Remember the choices made in the first two races.
localizations.hint_machine_41_carros: The car body that travels the greatest distance on card 60 is the best one to use.
localizations.answer_hint_1: Combine Cole Legend (card 1) with the journalist (card 97).
localizations.answer_hint_98: This is an hourly weather forecast. Now you just need to figure out what time the race begins.
localizations.answer_hint_30: You must access Machine 30 to begin the race.
localizations.answer_hint_12: Use your coin (13) on the steering wheel's loose screws (12).
localizations.answer_hint_46: Use your gloves (26) to open the scorching hot hood (46).
localizations.answer_hint_72: Use your goggles (19) with card 72 to see through the sandstorm.
localizations.answer_hint_74: The circuit curves to the right; therefore, take card 4.
localizations.answer_hint_4: At the end of the long straight, shift into second gear. Therefore, add +85 to card 4.
localizations.answer_hint_68: Legend is on card 68. To get right behind him, take card 67.
localizations.answer_hint_67: By overtaking and then merging in front of Legend's red car, then doing so again with the green car, you trace the number 3. Then, by accelerating straight ahead, you trace the number 1. Combined, this makes 31.
localizations.answer_hint_81: When the wheels are put together, they form the number 8.
localizations.answer_hint_8: Add card 12 (steering wheel with loose screws) and card 46 (overheating engine) to card 8.
localizations.answer_hint_20: To meet with the Number 1 racecar driver, take card 1.
localizations.answer_hint_66: Add the +30 written next to the garages of the Italian circuit (H) to 66.
localizations.answer_hint_96: The treadmarks on the back of the red cards are the same as those leading to the first garage.
localizations.answer_hint_40: Show the journalist (97) the non-compliant fuel (-40).
localizations.answer_hint_99: To read the article, take card 6.
localizations.answer_hint_6: Add Legend's challenge (6) to the HEADS value of your coin (10).
localizations.answer_hint_16: As you make your pre-race adjustments, select the red-circled tires.
localizations.answer_hint_14: Start with the green part (x10), then the black one (-10), followed by the white one (+20), and finally the last screw (÷3). 14x10 = 140. 140-10=130. 130+20=150. 150÷3=50.
localizations.answer_hint_50: Shifting from R to 3, you form the number 4. Then shifting from 4 to 5, you form the number 1. Combined this makes 41.
localizations.answer_hint_60: When making the proper adjustments, the car body with a spoiler had the best performance.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_3_pneus: At 15:00, the sky will be cloudy. Therefore, select the green tire with the arrows.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_91_pedal_susp: Choose a different pedal and suspension than those used in the first race.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_41_pneus: Select the tires marked with a red circle.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_41_pedal_susp: Choose a different pedal and suspension than those used in the first race.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_41_carros: Select the car body with a spoiler.
localizations.machine_911: As you regain consciousness, you try to recall what happened.
localizations.machine_88: "Great news! Your condition is stable, and you'll be discharged soon. What's more, the doctors have cleared you to get behind the wheel again for the Italian Grand Prix. Legend has a significant lead on you, but since you made it across the finish line, you still have a chance to secure a strong position in the championship."
localizations.machine_30: You're in the lead, and the finish line is only a short distance ahead!
localizations.machine_21: The lock opens with a click!
localizations.machine_3: "We're all set! Hurry, let's head to the starting line!"
localizations.machine_91: The race has started! Visibility remains limited because of the sandstorm, but that won't stop you.
localizations.machine_41: "You're all set to go! With Legend's penalty, you still have a shot at the championship; all you need to do is win the race! I believe in you!"
localizations.machine_3_tuto_1:
To start with, select your tires.
Pay attention to the weather forecast to choose the right ones.
localizations.machine_3_tuto_2: Now you need a gauge. Each circuit is unique, so you'll need to pick the one that fits!
localizations.machine_3_tuto_3: Finally, choose your Pedals and Suspension. After my survey of the circuit, I've selected the options most suitable for the race.
localizations.machine_3_tuto_4: All you need to do now is double-check the settings and confirm your selection.
localizations.machine_91_pedal_susp: Because of what happened in Japan, the parts you've selected are ruined. Bring me something else.
localizations.machine_41_pneus: Legend caused a real mess! We'll just have to make do with the last available set of tires.
localizations.machine_41_pedal_susp: Unfortunately, I couldn't salvage anything from your previous car. You'll need to find some other parts for me.
localizations.machine_41_carros: And finally, let's pick the best car body!
localizations.machine_3_intro: You follow Liz to your garage.
localizations.machine_30_intro:
You must win the race.

Players share steering and speed controls. Keep a close eye on the speed limit for each curve on card J.
localizations.machine_911_1: "The hospital?  How did I get here?"
localizations.machine_911_2: "I'm a racecar driver, and I remember being in a terrible accident."
localizations.machine_911_3: "There was a championship series with only 3 races remaining."
localizations.machine_911_4: "There were six cars of different colors speeding along the track; one of them was mine."
localizations.machine_911_5: "Yes, that's it; I was in Japan."
localizations.machine_25_2: "According to Liz, someone sabotaged my steering wheel. Luckliy, I made it out alive!"
localizations.machine_25_3: "After that, I went to the USA, where I experienced yet another problem."
localizations.machine_88_1: This is the last thing you remember…
localizations.machine_end_event_tuto:
When the pit crew wants to relay information to you, a panel will appear in the top right corner of the screen.

This panel will tell you which card you should take.
localizations.machine_end_intro:
You must win the race.

Players share steering and speed controls. Keep a close eye on the speed limit for each curve on card J. Also, monitor the instructions provided by your pit crew.
localizations.end: Victory! You've won the Grand Prix and claimed the championship! As you celebrate your success, you hear LEGEND complaining; he says a coin must have slipped into his car, jamming his clutch. However, nobody seems to be listening to him; all the attention is on you, the star of the show!
